# klct

This package contains functions to read in and analyze microCT data from
a NeoScan scanner as currently performed in the Khosla Lab. Sites
analyzed include femoral metaphysis, femoral diaphysis, and lumbar
vertebra. Analyses include trabecular bone parameters and cortical bone
parameters.

Both parametric (*t*-test, two-way ANOVA) and nonparametric (Wilcoxon
rank-sum, Aligned Rank Transform via `ARTool`) tests are supported.
Comparisons can be made between two treatments (with each sex analyzed
separately), or between two treatments and two sexes in a full two-way
design.

Measures are detected dynamically from the data, and the `measures`
parameter lets you analyze sensible defaults (`NULL`), all detected
columns (`"all"`), or a custom set of column names.

Mayo-themed R Markdown templates are available via the
[mayodown](https://github.com/KhoslaLab/mayodown) package.

## Installation

You can install the development version of klct from
[GitHub](https://github.com/KhoslaLab/klct) with:

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("KhoslaLab/klct")
```

## Example

``` r
library(klct)

mouse_table <- read_mouse_table(klct_ex("mouse-table.csv"))

spine_trab <- read_trabecular(klct_ex("spine_trabecular_data.csv"),
                              mouse_table, site = "Spine")

# Parametric comparison (default)
Spine.Tb <- compare_groups(spine_trab)

# Nonparametric comparison
Spine.Tb_np <- compare_groups(spine_trab, test = "nonparametric")

# All available trabecular measures
Spine.Tb_all <- compare_groups(spine_trab, measures = "all")

# Two-way (Treatment x Sex) comparison
Spine.Tb_2x2 <- compare_groups_2x2(spine_trab)
```

``` r
print_results(Spine.Tb)
```

**Tb.BV/TV**

| Sex | Treatment |   n |     Mean |       SD |      SEM |       Diff |    CI.Low |  CI.High | Pct.Change |         P |     P.adj | Sig |
|:----|:----------|----:|---------:|---------:|---------:|-----------:|----------:|---------:|-----------:|----------:|----------:|:----|
| F   | AP        |  16 | 12.88106 | 4.586384 | 1.146596 |            |           |          |            |           |           |     |
| F   | Vehicle   |  16 | 12.50113 | 5.188523 | 1.297131 | -0.3799375 | -3.917859 | 3.157984 |  -2.949582 | 0.8278017 | 0.9935045 |     |

**Tb.Th**

| Sex | Treatment |   n |      Mean |        SD |       SEM |       Diff |     CI.Low |   CI.High | Pct.Change |         P |     P.adj | Sig |
|:----|:----------|----:|----------:|----------:|----------:|-----------:|-----------:|----------:|-----------:|----------:|----------:|:----|
| F   | AP        |  16 | 0.0447956 | 0.0064922 | 0.0016231 |            |            |           |            |           |           |     |
| F   | Vehicle   |  16 | 0.0425694 | 0.0047217 | 0.0011804 | -0.0022262 | -0.0063413 | 0.0018888 |  -4.969793 | 0.2769481 | 0.9935045 |     |

| F   | Vehicle   |  16 | 0.3845125 | 0.0710554 | 0.0177639 | -0.0002125 | -0.0530845 | 0.0526595 | -0.0552343 | 0.9935045 | 0.9935045 |     |

## Templates

Four R Markdown templates are available from the RStudio template menu
(`File > New File > R Markdown > From Template`), via RStudio Addins
(`Addins > klct`) or via helper functions:

``` r
# Standard templates
create_two_treatment_comparison()
create_two_treatment_two_sex_comparison()

# Mayo-themed templates (uses mayodown::mayohtml)
create_two_treatment_comparison(mayo = TRUE)
create_two_treatment_two_sex_comparison(mayo = TRUE)
```

Parametric and nonparametric results are displayed as separate tabs
within each section, and Combined Sexes Plots tabs are included in all
sections.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`compare_groups()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/compare_groups.md)
  : Compare microCT data between two treatments
- [`compare_groups_2x2()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/compare_groups_2x2.md)
  : Compare microCT data between two treatments and two sexes
- [`create_two_treatment_comparison()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/create_two_treatment_comparison.md)
  [`create_two_treatment_two_sex_comparison()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/create_two_treatment_comparison.md)
  : Create a project skeleton to compare bone microCT data
- [`default_cortical_measures`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/default_cortical_measures.md)
  : Default cortical measures
- [`default_trabecular_measures`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/default_trabecular_measures.md)
  : Default trabecular measures
- [`klct_ex()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/klct_ex.md) :
  Get path to klct examples
- [`knit_with_colored_text()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/knit_with_colored_text.md)
  : Render an R Markdown document with colored text
- [`plot_groups()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/plot_groups.md)
  : Plot bone microCT data by treatment
- [`plot_groups_2x2()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/plot_groups_2x2.md)
  : Plot bone microCT data by treatment and sex
- [`print_data()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/print_data.md)
  : Print bone microCT data
- [`print_plots()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/print_plots.md)
  : Print a list of plots
- [`print_results()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/print_results.md)
  : Print bone microCT comparison analysis results
- [`print_results_2x2()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/print_results_2x2.md)
  : Print bone microCT two-way comparison results
- [`read_cortical()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/read_cortical.md)
  : Read in cortical bone data
- [`read_mouse_table()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/read_mouse_table.md)
  : Read in a mouse table
- [`read_trabecular()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/read_trabecular.md)
  : Read in trabecular bone data
- [`update_klct()`](https://khoslalab.github.io/klct/reference/update_klct.md)
  : Update klct
